242 G0300C_BAL_TRNG_ARND_CD G0300C_BAL_TRNG_ARND_CD G0300C Balance When Turning Around Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's balance while turning around and facing the opposite direction while walking. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Steady at all times
1=Not steady, but able to stabilize without human assistance
2=Not steady, only
